changes: Added ao-mission checkpoint inspect --mission <id> --json to load persisted checkpoint/resume bundles.
Added text readback output that reports mission, status, checkpoint count, final-response allowance, resume prompt, and readback-only authority flags.
Added CLI regression proving checkpoint inspect replays the checkpoint bundle written after Atlas final-synthesis readback import.
Updated production readiness to smoke the checkpoint inspect CLI after Atlas final-synthesis import.
Repacked node 21 public-safety evidence so it records scan results without embedding the scanner's own sensitive-pattern literals.
